zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Burnell於1325年出生在英國肯特哈德洛福時，他的父親Sir John Hadlow56歲，母親Maud Burnell35歲。他於1339年7月12日之前與Mary Joan Walcoate在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1383年1月13日享年58歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾阿克頓 伯奈爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Burnell于1325年出生在英国肯特哈德洛福时，他的父亲Sir John Hadlow56岁，母亲Maud Burnell35岁。他于1339年7月12日之前与Mary Joan Walcoate在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1383年1月13日享年58岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾阿克頓 伯奈爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Burnell was born in 1325, in Hadlow, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Hadlow, was 56 and his mother, Maud Burnell, was 35. He married Mary Joan Walcoate before 12 July 1339, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 13 January 1383, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Burnell est né en 1325, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hadlow, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Maud Burnell, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Mary Joan Walcoate avant 12 juillet 1339, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1383, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Burnell 1325 in Hadlow, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hadlow 56 und seine Mutter Maud Burnell 35. Er hat vor 12. Juli 1339 in England, United Kingdom Mary Joan Walcoate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Burnell è nato il nel 1325 nel Hadlow, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hadlow, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Maud Burnell, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Mary Joan Walcoate prima del 12 luglio 1339, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1383, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Burnellが1325年にイギリスケントハドロウで生まれた時，父Sir John Hadlowは56歳，母Maud Burnellは35歳であった。1339年7月12日以前にイギリスイギリスでMary Joan Walcoateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年1月13日に58歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアアクトン ブルネルスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Burnell(이)가 1325년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hadlow(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Burnell(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1339년 7월 12일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mary Joan Walcoate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 1월 13일 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 악턴 버넬 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Burnell nasceu em 1325, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hadlow, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Maud Burnell, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Joan Walcoate antes 12 de julho de 1339, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1383, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Burnell родился в 1325 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hadlow было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Burnell, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Joan Walcoate перед 12 июля 1339 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 13 января 1383 г. в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, актон бурнелл, шропшир, Англия.

Se casó con Mary Joan Walcoate antes de 12 de julio de 1339, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de enero de 1383, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Acton Burnell, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
